requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Low Voltage Directive (LVD) Scope & Essential Safety Objectives
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——低电压指令（LVD）适用范围及基本安全目标
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——低電壓指令（LVD）適用範圍及基本安全目標

summary.en: Directive 2014/35/EU (Low Voltage Directive, LVD) applies to electrical equipment designed for use between 50–1 000 V AC or 75–1 500 V DC. Grid-tied PV inverters fall within this scope. The Directive requires manufacturers to ensure equipment is designed and manufactured so that it does not endanger persons, domestic animals, or property when properly installed and maintained (Annex I essential safety objectives). Manufacturers must draw up an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) and affix the CE marking before placing the product on the EU market. No third-party notified body is required for LVD; conformity assessment is self-declared by the manufacturer.
summary.zh: 指令2014/35/EU（低电压指令，LVD）适用于设计使用电压在50至1 000 V交流或75至1 500 V直流之间的电气设备。并网光伏逆变器在此范围内。该指令要求制造商确保设备在正确安装和维护的情况下不会对人员、家养动物或财产造成危险（附件I基本安全目标）。制造商须在将产品投放欧盟市场前签署EU合格声明（DoC）并加贴CE标志。LVD不要求第三方公告机构介入，合规评估由制造商自行声明。
summary.zht: 指令2014/35/EU（低電壓指令，LVD）適用於設計使用電壓在50至1 000 V交流或75至1 500 V直流之間的電氣設備。並網光伏逆變器在此範圍內。該指令要求製造商確保設備在正確安裝和維護的情況下不會對人員、家養動物或財產造成危險（附件I基本安全目標）。製造商須在將產品投放歐盟市場前簽署EU合格聲明（DoC）並加貼CE標誌。LVD不要求第三方公告機構介入，合規評估由製造商自行聲明。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EC) No 765/2008 (CE marking general principles, Article 30)

summary.en: China does not have a single equivalent to the LVD as a general safety directive. Safety requirements for PV grid-connected inverters are addressed through sector-specific national standards such as GB/T 37408-2019 (recommended, voluntary) which covers safety requirements as one of several technical requirement categories. Mandatory product certification (CCC — China Compulsory Certification) does not currently list grid-tied PV inverters in the CCC mandatory catalogue; grid-tied PV inverters remain outside the CCC scope as of 2026, confirmed by the CNCA catalogue and industry practice — the voluntary CGC and CQC certification routes are the common market-differentiation paths for this product category.
summary.zh: 中国没有与LVD等同的通用安全指令。并网光伏逆变器的安全要求通过行业专用国家标准来规范，如GB/T 37408-2019（推荐性标准，自愿执行），其中安全要求是多项技术要求类别之一。强制性产品认证（CCC认证）目前未将并网光伏逆变器列入CCC强制目录；截至2026年，并网光伏逆变器仍不在CCC范围之内，经CNCA目录及行业实践证实——CGC和CQC自愿性认证是该类产品的常见市场差异化路径。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與LVD等同的通用安全指令。並網光伏逆變器的安全要求通過行業專用國家標準來規範，如GB/T 37408-2019（推薦性標準，自願執行），其中安全要求是多項技術要求類別之一。強制性產品認證（CCC認證）目前未將並網光伏逆變器列入CCC強制目錄；截至2026年，並網光伏逆變器仍不在CCC範圍之內，經CNCA目錄及行業實踐證實——CGC和CQC自願性認證是該類產品的常見市場差異化路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 (recommended national standard — technical requirements for PV grid-connected inverters)

gap.en: The EU LVD imposes a legally binding obligation on manufacturers to prepare an EU DoC and affix CE marking before market entry — a procedural compliance step with no direct CN equivalent. China's GB/T 37408-2019 is voluntary; compliance can be demonstrated through it but is not mandated by law for export. Exporters to the EU must establish and retain technical documentation per LVD Annex III and issue an EU DoC under their own responsibility.
gap.zh: EU LVD要求制造商在产品进入市场前依法签署EU合格声明并加贴CE标志，这一程序性合规步骤在中国没有直接等同要求。中国的GB/T 37408-2019为推荐性标准；可通过该标准证明合规，但法律上不作强制要求。出口欧盟的企业须依照LVD附件三建立并保存技术文件，并自行签署EU合格声明。
gap.zht: EU LVD要求製造商在產品進入市場前依法簽署EU合格聲明並加貼CE標誌，這一程序性合規步驟在中國沒有直接等同要求。中國的GB/T 37408-2019為推薦性標準；可通過該標準證明合規，但法律上不作強制要求。出口歐盟的企業須依照LVD附件三建立並保存技術文件，並自行簽署EU合格聲明。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only — not a certification conclusion. Products exported from China to the EU must have an EU DoC signed by the manufacturer or their EU authorised representative. CE marking is then affixed to the product. LVD is self-declared; no notified body involvement is required for this directive alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考，非认证结论。从中国出口至欧盟的产品须由制造商或其欧盟授权代表签署EU合格声明，并在产品上加贴CE标志。LVD为自行声明，单独适用本指令时无需公告机构介入。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考，非認證結論。從中國出口至歐盟的產品須由製造商或其歐盟授權代表簽署EU合格聲明，並在產品上加貼CE標誌。LVD為自行聲明，單獨適用本指令時無需公告機構介入。

requirement_topic.en: Product Safety Standards — EN IEC 62109-1 (General) & EN IEC 62109-2 (Inverters) Harmonised under LVD
requirement_topic.zh: 产品安全标准——EN IEC 62109-1（通用）及EN IEC 62109-2（逆变器）在LVD下的协调标准
requirement_topic.zht: 產品安全標準——EN IEC 62109-1（通用）及EN IEC 62109-2（逆變器）在LVD下的協調標準

summary.en: EN IEC 62109-1:2010 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and EN IEC 62109-2:2011 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters) are harmonised standards under Directive 2014/35/EU. Products tested and found conformant with both standards benefit from a presumption of conformity with the essential safety objectives of the LVD. EN IEC 62109-1 covers protection against electric shock, energy, fire, mechanical, and other hazards for PV power conversion equipment. EN IEC 62109-2 adds inverter-specific requirements including behaviour under abnormal grid conditions, protective functions, markings, and documentation. Use of these harmonised standards is voluntary — manufacturers may alternatively demonstrate conformity via other means — but they provide the most straightforward CE safety route for PV inverters. Note: a revised edition prEN IEC 62109-1:2025 is under CENELEC review as of 2025 (draft stage, not yet published as a harmonised standard); similarly prEN IEC 62109-2:2025 is also in draft. Until a superseding EN is published and listed in the OJ, EN IEC 62109-1:2010 and EN IEC 62109-2:2011 remain the current harmonised editions.
summary.zh: EN IEC 62109-1:2010（光伏发电系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）与EN IEC 62109-2:2011（第2部分：逆变器专用要求）是指令2014/35/EU（LVD）下的协调标准。经测试符合上述两项标准的产品，可推定符合LVD基本安全目标。EN IEC 62109-1涵盖光伏功率变换设备防触电、能量、火灾、机械及其他危险的要求；EN IEC 62109-2增加逆变器专用要求，包括在电网异常条件下的行为、保护功能、标识和文件要求。使用这些协调标准属于自愿性质，制造商亦可通过其他方式证明合规，但它们是光伏逆变器CE安全认证的最常见路径。注：截至2025年，修订版prEN IEC 62109-1正在制定中。
summary.zht: EN IEC 62109-1:2010（光伏發電系統用功率變換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）與EN IEC 62109-2:2011（第2部分：逆變器專用要求）是指令2014/35/EU（LVD）下的協調標準。經測試符合上述兩項標準的產品，可推定符合LVD基本安全目標。EN IEC 62109-1涵蓋光伏功率變換設備防觸電、能量、火災、機械及其他危險的要求；EN IEC 62109-2增加逆變器專用要求，包括在電網異常條件下的行為、保護功能、標識和文件要求。使用這些協調標準屬於自願性質，製造商亦可通過其他方式證明合規，但它們是光伏逆變器CE安全認證的最常見路徑。注：截至2025年，修訂版prEN IEC 62109-1正在制定中。

standards_or_laws: Commission Implementing Decision (EU) 2023/2723 (OJ L, 13.12.2023) — current harmonised standards list for LVD

summary.en: China does not have a directly equivalent national standard that mirrors the full scope of IEC 62109-1 + 62109-2 as a dedicated PV power converter safety standard. GB/T 37408-2019 incorporates safety-related requirements for grid-connected PV inverters but is not a standalone product safety standard of the same structure. Chinese manufacturers seeking the EU CE mark commonly obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports through the IECEE CB Scheme (facilitated by NCBs such as CQC — China Quality Certification Centre), which allows test results from an IECEE-recognized CB test laboratory to be accepted across member countries. Voluntary certifications from CQC or CGC (China General Certification, also known as 鉴衡认证) may also be based on IEC 62109. CGC operates a Solar Energy product certification scheme that references IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 as its primary safety standards for PV inverters; CGC certification therefore demonstrates IEC 62109-2 coverage, though the exact scope of each CGC certificate (e.g. which IEC 62109-2 clauses are tested, whether the full grid-interactive profile is covered) must be verified against the specific certificate issued.
summary.zh: 中国没有与IEC 62109-1+62109-2完整范围直接对应的专用光伏功率变换器安全国家标准。GB/T 37408-2019包含了并网光伏逆变器的安全相关要求，但并非具有相同结构的独立产品安全标准。寻求欧盟CE认证的中国制造商通常通过IECEE CB体系（由CQC等国家认证机构协助）获取IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告，该体系允许IECEE认可的CB测试实验室出具的测试结果在成员国间互认。CQC或CGC（鉴衡认证）颁发的自愿性认证证书通常基于IEC 62109；CGC太阳能产品认证方案以IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2为光伏逆变器主要安全标准，但各CGC证书覆盖的具体测试范围（如IEC 62109-2的具体条款及并网交互模式覆盖情况）须以实际颁发的证书为准。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與IEC 62109-1+62109-2完整範圍直接對應的專用光伏功率變換器安全國家標準。GB/T 37408-2019包含了並網光伏逆變器的安全相關要求，但並非具有相同結構的獨立產品安全標準。尋求歐盟CE認證的中國製造商通常通過IECEE CB體系（由CQC等國家認證機構協助）獲取IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告，該體系允許IECEE認可的CB測試實驗室出具的測試結果在成員國間互認。CQC或CGC（鑒衡認證）頒發的自願性認證證書通常基於IEC 62109；CGC太陽能產品認證方案以IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2為光伏逆變器主要安全標準，但各CGC證書涵蓋的具體測試範圍（如IEC 62109-2的具體條款及並網互動模式覆蓋情況）須以實際頒發的證書為準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1:2010 / IEC 62109-2:2011 (obtainable via IECEE CB Scheme through CQC or other NCBs)

gap.en: The key gap is not technical content but procedural: IEC 62109 test reports obtained through the CB Scheme are test-level recognitions and do not by themselves constitute EU CE compliance. To use these test results for CE marking, the manufacturer must: (1) hold or commission an EN IEC 62109-1/-2 test report from an EU-recognised laboratory; (2) incorporate findings into their LVD technical file; (3) issue an EU DoC. A CB test certificate can form the evidential basis of the EU technical file, but the DoC and CE marking step remain the manufacturer's sole responsibility. Additionally, EN IEC 62109-2:2011 is the current harmonised edition; manufacturers should confirm no superseding amendment has been listed in the OJ.
gap.zh: 主要差距不在技术内容，而在程序层面：通过CB体系获得的IEC 62109测试报告属于测试层面的认可，本身不构成EU CE合规。要将这些测试结果用于CE标志，制造商须：（1）持有或委托欧盟认可实验室出具的EN IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告；（2）将测试结果纳入LVD技术文件；（3）签署EU合格声明。CB测试证书可作为EU技术文件的证明依据，但合格声明和CE标志步骤仍由制造商自行负责。此外，EN IEC 62109-2:2011为当前协调版本，制造商应确认欧盟官方公报中尚无更新版本列入。
gap.zht: 主要差距不在技術內容，而在程序層面：通過CB體系獲得的IEC 62109測試報告屬於測試層面的認可，本身不構成EU CE合規。要將這些測試結果用於CE標誌，製造商須：（1）持有或委託歐盟認可實驗室出具的EN IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告；（2）將測試結果納入LVD技術文件；（3）簽署EU合格聲明。CB測試證書可作為EU技術文件的證明依據，但合格聲明和CE標誌步驟仍由製造商自行負責。此外，EN IEC 62109-2:2011為當前協調版本，製造商應確認歐盟官方公報中尚無更新版本列入。

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only — not a certification conclusion. Use of EN IEC 62109-1 and EN IEC 62109-2 is the typical CE safety route for grid-tied PV inverters exported to the EU. Having IEC 62109 CB test results supports — but does not replace — the EU DoC and technical file required under LVD 2014/35/EU.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考，非认证结论。EN IEC 62109-1和EN IEC 62109-2是并网光伏逆变器出口欧盟时常见的CE安全合规路径。持有IEC 62109 CB测试结果有助于支撑合规，但不能替代LVD 2014/35/EU要求的EU合格声明和技术文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考，非認證結論。EN IEC 62109-1和EN IEC 62109-2是並網光伏逆變器出口歐盟時常見的CE安全合規路徑。持有IEC 62109 CB測試結果有助於支撐合規，但不能替代LVD 2014/35/EU要求的EU合格聲明和技術文件。

requirement_topic.en: CE Marking — Affixing, Declaration of Conformity (DoC), and Technical Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志——加贴要求、合格声明（DoC）及技术文件
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌——加貼要求、合格聲明（DoC）及技術文件

summary.en: Under Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD), Article 6 and Annex III, the manufacturer must: (a) carry out the conformity assessment procedure; (b) draw up the technical documentation; (c) draw up the EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) per Annex IV — which must list all applicable EU directives, the harmonised standards applied, and be signed by the manufacturer or authorised representative; (d) affix the CE marking on the product or its nameplate visibly, legibly, and indelibly before placing it on the EU market. The CE marking may only be affixed by the manufacturer or their EU-based authorised representative. Technical documentation must be retained for 10 years after the last product is placed on the market and made available to market surveillance authorities on request.
summary.zh: 依据指令2014/35/EU（LVD）第6条及附件三，制造商须：（a）执行合格评定程序；（b）编制技术文件；（c）按附件四签署EU合格声明（DoC），需列明所有适用的EU指令、所采用的协调标准，并由制造商或授权代表签署；（d）在产品或铭牌上以清晰、易读、不可擦除的方式加贴CE标志，方可将产品投放欧盟市场。CE标志只能由制造商或其欧盟授权代表加贴。技术文件须在最后一批产品投放市场后保存10年，并应市场监督机构要求提供。
summary.zht: 依據指令2014/35/EU（LVD）第6條及附件三，製造商須：（a）執行合格評定程序；（b）編製技術文件；（c）按附件四簽署EU合格聲明（DoC），需列明所有適用的EU指令、所採用的協調標準，並由製造商或授權代表簽署；（d）在產品或銘牌上以清晰、易讀、不可擦除的方式加貼CE標誌，方可將產品投放歐盟市場。CE標誌只能由製造商或其歐盟授權代表加貼。技術文件須在最後一批產品投放市場後保存10年，並應市場監督機構要求提供。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD) — Article 6, Annex III, Annex IV
Regulation (EC) No 765/2008 — CE marking general principles
Decision No 768/2008/EC — conformity assessment procedures reference framework

summary.en: China does not require CE marking for domestic market products. The closest domestic compliance marker for electrical products subject to compulsory certification is the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) mark, administered by CNCA. As confirmed in row eu-safety-001, grid-tied PV inverters are not listed in the CCC mandatory catalogue as of 2026. Voluntary certifications such as CQC mark or CGC (鉴衡) certificate serve a market-differentiation function but are not legally equivalent to CE marking. There is no Chinese equivalent of the EU DoC; export declarations and product conformance documents serve different regulatory purposes.
summary.zh: 中国境内销售的产品无需CE标志。强制性认证电气产品中最接近的合规标志是CCC（中国强制认证）标志，由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理。如第eu-safety-001行所确认，截至2026年，并网光伏逆变器未列入CCC强制认证目录。CQC标志或CGC（鉴衡）证书等自愿性认证起市场差异化作用，但与CE标志不具有法律等同性。中国没有与EU合格声明等同的文件；出口报关单和产品合规文件服务于不同的监管目的。
summary.zht: 中國境內銷售的產品無需CE標誌。強制性認證電氣產品中最接近的合規標誌是CCC（中國強制認證）標誌，由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理。如第eu-safety-001行所確認，截至2026年，並網光伏逆變器未列入CCC強制認證目錄。CQC標誌或CGC（鑒衡）證書等自願性認證起市場差異化作用，但與CE標誌不具有法律等同性。中國沒有與EU合格聲明等同的文件；出口報關單和產品合規文件服務於不同的監管目的。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — administered by CNCA (conditional applicability — verify current catalogue)
CQC voluntary mark (China Quality Certification Centre)
CGC voluntary certification (China General Certification / 鉴衡认证)

gap.en: CE marking and the EU DoC are legally required EU market entry mechanisms that have no Chinese domestic equivalent. A Chinese manufacturer without an EU presence must appoint an EU-based authorised representative to sign the DoC on their behalf if the manufacturer is outside the EU. The technical documentation obligation (10-year retention, structure per LVD Annex III) is a significant administrative gap relative to Chinese export documentation practice, which typically focuses on test reports and certificates rather than an integrated technical file.
gap.zh: CE标志和EU合格声明是进入欧盟市场的法定要求，在中国国内没有等同要求。在欧盟境外的中国制造商须指定一名欧盟境内的授权代表代其签署合格声明。技术文件义务（10年保存期、按LVD附件三规定的文件结构）与中国出口文件惯例相比存在较大差距，后者通常以测试报告和证书为主，而非一体化技术文件。
gap.zht: CE標誌和EU合格聲明是進入歐盟市場的法定要求，在中國國內沒有等同要求。在歐盟境外的中國製造商須指定一名歐盟境內的授權代表代其簽署合格聲明。技術文件義務（10年保存期、按LVD附件三規定的文件結構）與中國出口文件慣例相比存在較大差距，後者通常以測試報告和證書為主，而非一體化技術文件。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only — not a certification conclusion. CE marking is a legal market-entry requirement for the EU, not a quality or performance certification. The DoC is a manufacturer's self-declaration; its accuracy is the manufacturer's sole legal responsibility. Affixing CE marking without completing the full conformity assessment procedure is a legal violation under EU law.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考，非认证结论。CE标志是进入欧盟市场的法定要求，而非质量或性能认证标志。合格声明（DoC）是制造商的自行声明，其准确性由制造商承担全部法律责任。未完成完整合格评定程序即加贴CE标志，违反EU法律规定。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考，非認證結論。CE標誌是進入歐盟市場的法定要求，而非質量或性能認證標誌。合格聲明（DoC）是製造商的自行聲明，其準確性由製造商承擔全部法律責任。未完成完整合格評定程序即加貼CE標誌，違反EU法律規定。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements — EU Network Code for Generators (RfG) & Grid-Tied PV Inverter Technical Performance
requirement_topic.zh: 并网要求——EU发电机并网规范（RfG）及并网光伏逆变器技术性能
requirement_topic.zht: 並網要求——EU發電機並網規範（RfG）及並網光伏逆變器技術性能

summary.en: Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Network Code on Requirements for Grid Connection of Generators, NC RfG) establishes harmonised EU-wide technical requirements for grid-connected power-generating modules, including PV inverters. The regulation classifies generators into types A–D by installed capacity and voltage level, with requirements becoming progressively more demanding. For PV inverters, key requirements include: operating within specified voltage and frequency ranges without disconnection; reactive power capability; fault ride-through (FRT) capability for type B and above; anti-islanding protection; and power quality (harmonics). The regulation applies directly in all EU member states; national grid operators then set specific parameter values within the ranges the regulation prescribes. Note: NC RfG is separate from LVD/CE marking — it governs grid-connected operation and is enforced via grid connection agreements, not CE marking. NC RfG is a directly applicable EU Regulation and does not require transposition; however, national grid operators set specific parameter values within the ranges NC RfG prescribes, and not all member states have finalised all national implementation measures — enforcement uniformity is a function of each DSO's connection agreement, not a gap in the Regulation itself.
summary.zh: 委员会法规（EU）2016/631（发电机并网规范，NC RfG）建立了适用于欧盟全境的并网发电模块（含光伏逆变器）技术要求。该法规按装机容量和电压等级将发电机分为A至D四类，要求随类别提高而更加严格。对光伏逆变器而言，主要要求包括：在规定的电压和频率范围内运行而不断网；无功功率能力；B类及以上须具备低电压穿越（FRT）能力；防孤岛保护；以及电能质量（谐波）要求。该法规在所有欧盟成员国直接适用；各国电网运营商随后在法规规定的范围内设定具体参数值。注：NC RfG与LVD/CE标志分属不同体系，其规范并网运行，通过并网协议执行，而非CE标志流程。NC RfG是直接适用的欧盟法规，无需转化；各成员国电网运营商在法规规定的范围内设定具体参数值，并非所有成员国均已完成全部国家实施措施，但执行一致性取决于各DSO的并网协议，而非法规本身的缺失。
summary.zht: 委員會法規（EU）2016/631（發電機並網規範，NC RfG）建立了適用於歐盟全境的並網發電模組（含光伏逆變器）技術要求。該法規按裝機容量和電壓等級將發電機分為A至D四類，要求隨類別提高而更加嚴格。對光伏逆變器而言，主要要求包括：在規定的電壓和頻率範圍內運行而不斷網；無功功率能力；B類及以上須具備低電壓穿越（FRT）能力；防孤島保護；以及電能質量（諧波）要求。該法規在所有歐盟成員國直接適用；各國電網運營商隨後在法規規定的範圍內設定具體參數值。注：NC RfG與LVD/CE標誌分屬不同體系，其規範並網運行，通過並網協議執行，而非CE標誌流程。NC RfG是直接適用的歐盟法規，無需轉化；各成員國電網運營商在法規規定的範圍內設定具體參數值，並非所有成員國均已完成全部國家實施措施，但執行一致性取決於各DSO的並網協議，而非法規本身的缺失。

standards_or_laws: Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (NC RfG — Network Code on Requirements for Grid Connection of Generators)

EN 50549-1:2019 / EN 50549-2:2019 (requirements for generating plants connected to distribution networks — note: NC RfG 2016/631 does not provide for harmonised standards in the CE-marking sense; EN 50549-1/-2 are CENELEC standards used as the principal technical reference for national implementation of RfG, widely applied by DSOs and type-test laboratories across the EU, but they do not confer a presumption of conformity via an OJ harmonised-standard listing)

summary.en: China's equivalent grid connection technical framework for PV inverters is primarily GB/T 37408-2019 (recommended, covering electrical performance including active/reactive power, voltage/frequency ride-through, anti-islanding, harmonics, and grid stability for inverters) and GB/T 19964-2024 (recommended, technical requirements for connecting photovoltaic power stations to the power system, which covers power station-level grid connection requirements including fault ride-through, reactive voltage, and power quality). Both are recommended (voluntary) standards. In practice, grid connection approval by State Grid or CSG requires demonstrating conformance with these standards via type-test reports and a project-specific grid study; NEA/NDRC project-approval documents typically reference them as the applicable technical basis, making them de facto mandatory in grid-connected project licensing even though the standards themselves carry the 「推荐性」(recommended) classification.
summary.zh: 中国针对光伏逆变器并网技术框架的主要标准是GB/T 37408-2019（推荐性，涵盖逆变器有功/无功功率、电压/频率穿越、防孤岛、谐波及电网稳定性等电气性能要求）和GB/T 19964-2024（推荐性，光伏发电站并网技术要求，涵盖发电站层面的故障穿越、无功电压及电能质量等并网要求）。两者均为推荐性（自愿执行）标准。实践中，国家电网或南方电网的并网审批要求通过型式测试报告和项目电网研究证明符合上述标准；能源局/国家发改委项目审批文件通常将其列为适用技术依据，使其在并网工程许可中实际具有强制性，尽管标准本身标注为「推荐性」。
summary.zht: 中國針對光伏逆變器並網技術框架的主要標準是GB/T 37408-2019（推薦性，涵蓋逆變器有功/無功功率、電壓/頻率穿越、防孤島、諧波及電網穩定性等電氣性能要求）和GB/T 19964-2024（推薦性，光伏發電站並網技術要求，涵蓋發電站層面的故障穿越、無功電壓及電能質量等並網要求）。兩者均為推薦性（自願執行）標準。實踐中，國家電網或南方電網的並網審批要求通過型式測試報告和項目電網研究證明符合上述標準；能源局/國家發改委項目審批文件通常將其列為適用技術依據，使其在並網工程許可中實際具有強制性，儘管標準本身標註為「推薦性」。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 (recommended — PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements, incl. electrical performance and grid stability)
GB/T 19964-2024 (recommended — technical requirements for connecting PV power stations to the power system)

gap.en: The EU NC RfG is an EU-wide directly applicable regulation (not a directive requiring transposition), creating binding, harmonised minimum grid connection technical requirements. China's GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 are voluntary national standards; actual grid connection parameter requirements are set through utility-level connection agreements and may vary regionally. Key technical alignment areas where gaps may exist include: fault ride-through parameter ranges (voltage depth and duration requirements differ between EU member state implementations and Chinese grid codes); reactive power capability curves; anti-islanding detection time thresholds; and power quality limits. Exporters must verify the specific NC RfG parameter values mandated by the national grid operator (TSO/DSO) in the destination EU country.
gap.zh: EU NC RfG是直接适用于全欧盟的法规（而非需要转化的指令），设定了具有约束力的协调并网最低技术要求。中国的GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964为推荐性国家标准；实际并网参数要求通过电网企业层面的并网协议设定，可能因地区而异。可能存在差距的主要技术对标领域包括：低电压穿越参数范围（EU成员国实施要求与中国电网规范的电压跌落深度和持续时间要求存在差异）；无功功率能力曲线；防孤岛检测时间阈值；以及电能质量限值。出口商须核实目的地EU成员国的输配电网运营商（TSO/DSO）规定的具体NC RfG参数值。
gap.zht: EU NC RfG是直接適用於全歐盟的法規（而非需要轉化的指令），設定了具有約束力的協調並網最低技術要求。中國的GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964為推薦性國家標準；實際並網參數要求通過電網企業層面的並網協議設定，可能因地區而異。可能存在差距的主要技術對標領域包括：低電壓穿越參數範圍（EU成員國實施要求與中國電網規範的電壓跌落深度和持續時間要求存在差異）；無功功率能力曲線；防孤島檢測時間閾值；以及電能質量限值。出口商須核實目的地EU成員國的輸配電網運營商（TSO/DSO）規定的具體NC RfG參數值。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only — not a certification conclusion. NC RfG grid connection requirements are separate from LVD CE marking requirements and are enforced through grid connection agreements, not product certification. Compliance with NC RfG technical parameters must be demonstrated to the relevant national grid operator in the destination EU member state.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考，非认证结论。NC RfG并网要求与LVD CE标志要求属于不同体系，通过并网协议执行，而非产品认证。需向目的地欧盟成员国的相关国家电网运营商证明符合NC RfG技术参数要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考，非認證結論。NC RfG並網要求與LVD CE標誌要求屬於不同體系，通過並網協議執行，而非產品認證。需向目的地歐盟成員國的相關國家電網運營商證明符合NC RfG技術參數要求。
